title: Management
subtitle: People who supervise workers but are not on the workforce themselves.
noManagers: No managers yet. Add one or import a list to get started.

import.title: Import Managers
import.description: Upload an .xlsx file using the template. The file is processed in two passes so a manager can reference another manager that appears later in the same sheet.
import.templateHint: Need the format? Download the template first.

actions.hasReportsBlocked: Cannot deactivate: this manager still has direct reports or workers attached. Reassign them first.

reassign.title: Reassign reports first
reassign.description: {{name}} has {{workers}} direct workers and {{subManagers}} sub-managers. Choose how to handle them before deactivating.
reassign.optionReassign: Reassign all reports to another manager
reassign.optionOrphan: Leave reports unassigned (they will appear in the Unmanaged section)
